grading.note: GORILA word dividers used ONLY to grade; never a model input.

over_segmentation_caveat: B4 established any LA segmentation is an OVER-CUT SUPERSET with ~0 skill over cut-everywhere at LA's hapax regime; this ensemble is a PROBABILISTIC boundary set, NOT a deterministic ground-truth segmentation. Read prob as vote-share, not P(true boundary).
non_circularity: GORILA dividers + phonetic values used ONLY to grade; the 5 families are frozen unsupervised B3 implementations.

grading_signal.note: AUC of each ranking to discriminate GORILA gold word-boundary gaps (grading ONLY, non-circular).
grading_signal.interpretation: distributional ensemble prob barely beats chance (0.565); physical/administrative source-representation marks (row-break, numeral closure) recover word boundaries FAR better -- LA boundary signal is physical/administrative, not distributional.
